mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(s.value, 0) FROM dept_stats s WHERE s.dept_name = #{deptName} AND s.metric_id = #{metricId} AND s.year = #{year} LIMIT 1
SELECT IFNULL(s.value, 0) FROM dept_stats s WHERE s.metric_id = #{metricId} AND s.year = #{year} LIMIT 1
SELECT year AS `year`, value AS `value` FROM dept_stats WHERE metric_id = #{metricId} ORDER BY year ASC
